summary: #39739 remains the live canonical issue for scheme-level wildcard support. #38290 is related but narrower exact-origin repair for chrome-extension:// origins, and the already-closed refs stay historical evidence only. No close, merge, label, or fix action is safe until a maintainer decides whether scheme wildcard matching is an accepted gateway capability.

actions.reason: Autonomous implementation is blocked on maintainer product/security-direction approval for scheme-level wildcard matching.
Keep #38290 open as related exact-origin repair; do not merge or close it as part of the wildcard policy cluster.
Already closed direct wildcard PR; retain as historical evidence only.
